name: logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week tool
description: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week, slow inventory turnover reporting causes stockouts and delayed shipments. We automate report generation instead of manual reporting from ERP systems.
problem_solved: Inability to quickly assess inventory turnover leads to stockouts and delayed shipments.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to quickly assess inventory turnover leads to stockouts and delayed shipments.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week, slow inventory turnover reporting causes stockouts and delayed shipments. We automate report generation instead of manual reporting from ERP systems.
